hero.title: Reliable welfare support for Vivekanandha Trust.
hero.description: A premium light-yellow and white experience for a welfare trust serving volunteers, donors, students, and the wider public. The design emphasizes clean hierarchy, open space, and a calm professional tone.
hero.accent: Built to communicate impact without visual noise, and to make every key action easy to find.

aboutSection.title: A focused trust built for measurable community care
aboutSection.description: The trust combines practical relief work, student support, and volunteer-led outreach with transparent communication for every supporter.

trustHighlights.title: Education first
trustHighlights.description: Scholarships, stationery drives, mentoring circles, and digital learning support for students.

trustHighlights.title: Community care
trustHighlights.description: Nutrition, health camps, elderly support, and emergency response initiatives built around local needs.

trustHighlights.title: Volunteer-led
trustHighlights.description: A structured network of volunteers, coordinators, and partners working with clarity and accountability.

missionSection.title: Support that is practical, measurable, and dignified
missionSection.description: Our mission is to deliver welfare programs that solve real needs while keeping the process simple and trustworthy.

missionPoints: Deliver practical welfare programs with dignity and transparency.
Build long-term opportunities for students, families, and underserved communities.
Encourage civic participation through volunteering and donor partnerships.

visionSection.title: A community where support feels dependable
visionSection.description: Our vision is a welfare platform known for accountability, reliable service, and a human touch in every interaction.

visionPoints: A future where support systems feel reliable, accessible, and human.
A trust recognized for measurable outcomes and responsible stewardship.
A community ecosystem where public generosity turns into visible change.

activitiesSection.title: Programs designed around students, families, and communities
activitiesSection.description: A clear mix of education, health, nutrition, and empowerment initiatives keeps the trust focused on practical outcomes.

eventsSection.title: Community-driven events with clear schedules
eventsSection.description: Each event is designed to be easy to understand, easy to share, and easy to participate in.

donationCta.title: Donations become visible outcomes
donationCta.description: Your support funds education, health, and relief programs with regular reporting and donor clarity.
lines: Support school kits and scholarship assistance.
Fund health camps and emergency relief activity.
Enable transparent donor updates and impact reporting.

newsSection.title: Updates that keep the public informed
newsSection.description: Short, readable news cards help donors and supporters understand what is happening right now.

testimonialsSection.title: Trust built through real supporter experiences
testimonialsSection.description: The site balances warmth with professionalism so the people behind the programs feel tangible.

testimonials.quote: The trust's support helped my daughter continue school without interruption. The process was respectful and clear.
testimonials.name: Ayesha M.

testimonials.quote: As a volunteer, I found the coordination professional and the impact visible from the first week.
testimonials.name: Rahul P.

testimonials.quote: Donating here feels accountable. The updates, photos, and reporting build real trust.
testimonials.name: Dr. Meera S.

galleryPreviewSection.title: A visual snapshot of community work
galleryPreviewSection.description: Simple preview tiles keep the gallery feeling polished while remaining light and fast.

volunteerCta.title: Join a structured volunteer network
volunteerCta.description: Volunteers get onboarding, clear assignments, and the chance to contribute to visible community results.

contactCta.title: Reach the trust with confidence
contactCta.description: A compact contact block keeps key details visible for visitors who want to connect quickly.
